formal_proof_obligations.role: convert the verified route gate into a formal theorem statement surface
list every analytic assumption still used by the restricted-continuation route
separate Lean-proved components from declared analytic assumptions
prevent the formal theorem proof target from being misread as full RR closure

positive: Records the formal RR theorem proof target after the restricted-continuation route closure gate.
Separates theorem-target declaration from actual proof of the theorem.
Makes explicit that analytic assumption discharge is the next blocker before any formal RR theorem proof can be claimed.
negative: Does not prove the formal restricted-continuation theorem.
Does not prove the norm-control theorem.
Does not discharge all analytic assumptions in Lean.
Does not close the RR restricted-continuation theorem.
Does not close the full RR theorem.
Does not claim final scientific closure.
